evidence.title: Smooth Manpower Supply Services | Smooth Company Dubai-UAE
evidence.description: Smooth Manpower Company UAE delivers expert manpower supply services in Dubai and across the UAE. Reliable staffing solutions for every industry.
evidence.text:
Payroll Bureau Services
Payroll Management is often complex and involves tons of paperwork. When you outsource its management to us, you have a dedicated expert in finance, accounting and taxation at your disposal, at all times.
SMOOTH MANPOWER SUPPLIES was established in 2005 and has maintained an excellent track record in the field of contracting and manpower services in several different sectors ranging from blue collar to white collar workers. We have a wide, diverse and dedicated workforce that hail from different parts of the world – India, Sri Lanka, Pakistan, Ghana and Nigeria
We operate a tailored extension of your HR with compliant and efficient solutions for ...
Our unique approach and understanding of our clients’ business allows us to ...
Payroll Management is often complex and involves tons of paperwork. When you outsource its management to us, you have a dedicated expert in finance, accounting and taxation at your disposal, at all times.
No quota limitations.
Ministry of labour authorized company.
Dedicated delivery teams with local and global experience.
Project-Managed transitions.
Quicker delivery at lower costs.
Exclusive partnerships and access to global networks.
Smooth Manpower Supply Services has been a valuable partner, providing exceptional support to our projects. We look forward to working with them on future projects should an opportunity arise. We wish Smooth and its team all the very best in their future endeavors.
Smooth Manpower Supply Services has provided exceptional support to our joinery factory and key projects like Bab Al Shams, Bulgari, Dorchester DMCC, and Atlantis. Their dedication and professionalism are truly appreciated.
Smooth Manpower Supply Services has been a reliable support to our projects at Dubai Hills and Palm Jumeirah. Their dedication and professionalism have been commendable, and we truly appreciate their efforts. We look forward to future collaborations
